title: BookWalker Global Service Launches New Global English Platform With LCP DRM System Following Delay
content: Kadokawa's BookWalker Global store announced on Monday that it has launched its new rebuilt website, apps, and reader, after a delay from February. The launch includes the previously announced new Lightweight Content Protection (LCP) DRM system, which allows users to access purchases through LCP-compatible reading…
author: ANN

title: Yūgo Kobayashi's New Manga Delayed to Summer, Aoashi Brotherfoot Spinoff to Resume on April 6
content: This year's 18th issue of Shogakukan's Big Comic Spirits magazine announced on Monday that Yūgo Kobayashi's planned new manga will launch this summer. In addition, Aoashi Brotherfoot, the spinoff to Kobayashi's Aoashi manga, will resume in the magazine's 19th issue on April 6.
author: ANN

title: Hajime no Ippo Manga Takes Break Due to Creator's Hospitalization
content: Image via Amazon Japan© George Morikawa, KodanshaGeorge Morikawa announced on X/Twitter that his Hajime no Ippo boxing manga will remain on break as he was hospitalized on Monday and is focusing on recovery. He expects to be back in about a month.
author: ANN

title: 'Go for It, Nakamura!' TV Anime Gets Same-Day English Dub
content: Image courtesy of Crunchyroll©Nakamura-kun!! Animation ProjectCrunchyroll announced on Monday that it will stream a same-day English dub for the television anime adaptation of Syundei's Go for It, Nakamura! (Ganbare!
author: ANN

title: Dark Horse Licenses Suicide Island, Babanba Banban Vampire, Asobi Asobase, Forget-Me-Not Manga
content: Dark Horse announced on Monday that it has licensed the following manga for release this fall and winter: Image courtesy of Dark Horse© Kouji Mori Title: Suicide Island (Jisatsutou) Creator: Kouji Mori Release: December 8 Summary: In a story evoking both Lord of the Flies and Battle Royale, a young Japanese man, Sei,…
author: ANN

title: 'Golden Kamuy: Bousou Ressha-hen' Announced for Next Winter
content: The 13th and final episode of Golden Kamuy: Saishuushou ( Golden Kamuy Final Season ) announced an anime sequel adapting the Bousou Ressha-hen ( Runaway Train arc ) on Monday. The official website also revealed a teaser visual (pictured). The sequel is scheduled to be released next Winter.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Manga Up! Global Adds Hinomiya's Welcome to the Yandere Cafe, More Manga in English
content: Image courtesy of Manga Up! GlobalManga UP! Global added Hinomiya's Welcome to the Yandere Cafe (Yandere Cafe e Yōkoso) manga in English on Saturday. It added Hiroumi Aoi's The Beast King Ouma Reconquers the World (Kemono no Ō Ma no Sekai Reconquest) manga in English on Tuesday.Manga UP!
author: ANN

title: Kingdom Manga Gets 2nd Stage Play from August
content: TOHO revealed on Monday that Yasuhisa Hara's Kingdom manga is getting a second stage play adaptation titled Kingdom II -Keishō- (Kingdom II -Inheritance-). The new stage play will run in August-September in Tokyo, in Osaka in September, and in Fukuoka in October.
author: ANN

title: The World Standard/Wasuta Girl Group to End Activities
content: Image via The World Standard group's X/Twitter account©AvexJapanese girl group The World Standard (nicknamed Wasuta) announced on Friday that the group will end activities with its final live performance scheduled this winter.
author: ANN

title: Golden Kamuy Final Season - Episode 62 - Wilk's Daughter
content: Sugimoto and Asirpa flee Goryoukaku and board a nearby train.
author: Crunchyroll
